title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nerolac Select

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nerolac Select
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!
